initiatives.name: Bronx Mutual Aid Network
initiatives.description: Bronx Mutual Aid Network is an entirely volunteer-run, community-funded initiative to help those that are most vulnerable.

initiatives.name: Bronx Anti-War Coalition
initiatives.description: We are a Lënapehòkink (Bronx) based working-class, BIPOC-led, anti-imperialist, direct-action coalition resisting state violence while advancing decolonization.

initiatives.name:
Bronx Palestine Solidarity
                            Committee
initiatives.description: From Bronx to Palestine, by any means necessary.

initiatives.name: The BLK Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A community-led mutual aid initiative serving the Bronx through food distribution, resource sharing, and community support programs.

initiatives.name: South Bronx Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: South Bronx Mutual Aid is a volunteer group of neighbors helping neighbors.

initiatives.name: Take Back The Bronx
initiatives.description: A radical grassroots collective organizing for community control of the hood since 2011.

initiatives.name: Friendly Fridge BX
initiatives.description: As the Friendly Fridge BX team-the first community fridge in the Bronx, we rescue & redirect food from the surrounding community through outreach & action.

initiatives.name: South Bronx Unite
initiatives.description: South Bronx Unite brings together neighborhood residents, community organizations, academic institutions, and allies to improve and protect the social, environmental, and economic future of Mott Haven and Port Morris.

initiatives.name: Jupi BX
initiatives.description: Educating, organizing, and mobilizing Puerto Rican youth and students and their allies for an independent, anti-imperialist, and socialist Puerto Rico

initiatives.name: Mekong NYC
initiatives.description: Mekong NYC is a social justice organization that brings dignity and value to the lives of Southeast Asians in the Bronx and throughout New York City.
